Description: For long memories: split across pages by writing `||` between them. Example: `First page of the memory. || Second page. || Third page.` Single-string answers also auto-paginate at sentences once they exceed ~320 chars.
Game title shown on opening screen
One-line tagline shown under the title
Default: Tim has lost the memories that make him who he is.

Description: Opening story shown on the parchment scroll. ~3-6 lines. Use a blank line for paragraph breaks.
Default:
Tim awakens in cold stone, his head pounding.

He cannot remember who he is, what he loves, or how he works.
Six dungeon-dwellers stand between him and the world above.

Each one holds a piece of him.
Open the door. Talk to all six. Walk east into the light.

Description: Closing story shown on the parchment scroll after Tim escapes into the meadow. ~3-6 lines.
Default:
Tim emerges into the meadow, blinking in the sun.

The memories settle back into him: who he is, what he loves,
the way he writes, the way he works, the way he shows up.

He brushes the dust from his glasses, and walks east —
ready, once more, to deliver shareholder value.

Description: How Tim phrases his question to each NPC. Use {prompt} as a placeholder.
Default:
Hey — do you remember this one?
"{prompt}"

Description: Display name for the green goblin character
Reaction line the goblin says before delivering Tim's memory. Two lines: a stage direction + a quote.
Default:
The goblin balances precariously on a single stiletto.
"Ohhh, Tim. I remember this one..."

Description: Display name for the cigar-smoking fairy
Fairy's reaction line
Default:
She blows a slow ring of smoke.
"Sit down, sweetie. Auntie's gonna remind you."

Description: Display name for the angry pig character
Pig's reaction line
Default:
Mr. Piggums snorts derisively.
"Ugh. Fine. Here's one I happen to remember."

Description: Display name for the grandma on the ATV
Grandma's reaction line
Default:
Her engine idles. She kicks up dust.
"Climb on, kiddo. Lemme tell ya somethin'."

Description: Display name for the cheese character
Cheez's reaction line
Default:
His eyes glaze a little redder.
"Aged like me, you have. Hear me out."

Description: Display name for the blue Statue of Liberty
Statue's reaction line
Default:
She lowers her torch to your eye level.
"Give me your tired, your puzzled, your forgotten."
